reason: This is a true/false conceptual recognition task over general eigenvalue/eigenvector statements (e.g. 'eigenvectors for distinct eigenvalues are always independent', 'a real matrix always has a real eigenvalue', 'eigenvectors are unique up to scale') asking which are always/never true, a verdict over universally-quantified claims rather than a single solver-computable number for a specific instance, so there is no code-computable scalar answer_spec for it.
